title: ExtraRecipes
description: Adds A Few Extra Crafting and Smelting Recipes "Vanilla"
body:
## **ExtraRecipes**
Adds a few recipes that don't change the game too much and only focus on QOL changes. If I think any of the recipes I've added is too large of a change I will most likely remove it or modify the recipe in future updates.

I recommend taking a look at the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/plugin/extrarecipes/gallery) to give you an idea about what this plugin adds. If you have questions or recipe requests please join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/v88JCDcEUF) and make a ticket.

![RFTL1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l4bBfipq/images/79792baf626a3d84d24709130f95626925e64ebb.png)                    
This Plugin allows you to smelt rotten flesh inside a furnace, smoker or using a campfire.

![RFTL2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/l4bBfipq/images/c429d5fdc1f5c442a807e96754319845cf5729a4.png)    
I've also provided a recipe that adds loss to crafting leather by using 9 rotten flesh inside a crafting table.

#### **Note**
I'm in no way a proper dev there are probably better ways to do what I've done but yeah I'm happy since it works atm.
All Recipes that this plugin adds can be configured if you don't like something I've added you can disable it.
